title: [FIRRTL] infer width from 0-width
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    input inp_a: UInt<0>
    output _tmp46: UInt
    _tmp46 <= not(inp_a)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:2:3: error: uninferred width: type '!firrtl.uint' has no known width
  module top_mod :
  ^
a_top_mod.fir:2:3: note: in port `_tmp46` of module `top_mod`
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
);
endmodule
```
